label: Beggars
rules: Tax: gain 1 coin

label: Miners
rules: Whenever you Extract, gain 3 stone

label: Priests
rules:
In Battles, you may spend any number of charges to ignore that many hits.
Lock: gain 1 charge per magic card, up to 3. Store up to 6.

label: Lookout towers
rules:
Any action: place 1 unit in each of your outpost 
In Battles adjacent to your oupost, at the Start of Battle, you may move 1 unit(+1 if you have 3 defense) to the battle region. Roll that many extra melee dice.

label: Travelling Merchants
rules: Any action: gain 3 coins per wealth

label: Farmers
rules: Extract: gain 1 food per commoner

label: Labourers
rules: When you Build, you may pay up to 2 resources (+1 per other mercenary card) with coins instead. You can build 1 extra construction

label: Looters
rules:
1. In Battles, roll +1 melee die if you have another warrior 
2. When you kill one or more units, gain 1 coin

label: Vanguard
rules: Move: after all steps, move one extra step (even with units you already moved). Then take 1 resource per expansion card from regions you control.

label: Dryads
rules: Any action: gain 1 wood, +2 if you have another magic

label: Acolytes
rules:
When your unit dies, gain 1 coin
Any action: you may sacrifice a unit to gain 2 food.

label: Workshops
rules: When you activate a commoner, gain 2 wood, place it on this card. You can spend wood here as if it were any resource.

label: Raiders
rules: When you move, select one of the destination regions. If the region produces a resource, steal 1 of that resource (+1 if you have 4 warriors) from each opponent with a unit there.

label: Bane chanters
rules:
When you sacrifice a unit, gain 1 charge, store up to 6.
Battle: spend charges to reroll that many melee dice

label: Shield wall
rules: Battle: Ranged or Melee - ignore the first hit assigned to you (+1 if you have 3 defense). Gain +1 melee dice per warrior, up to 3

label: Tax collectors
rules:
When you gain coins from another card's ability, gain +1 coin from the same source.
Tax: after income, steal 2 coins (+1 if you have 3 crime) from each opponent

label: Druids
rules: Any action: Select up to 1 forest you control per wilderderness card. Pay 1 wood per forest selected to place 1 unit per shadow card(max 3), to each selected forest.

label: Waystations
rules: Cleanup: Move 1 step per expansion card

label: Volunteers
rules:
In each Aftermath, if you were the defender and at least one of your units was killed by opponents, place one unit in your homeland.
Any action: If you have a nobility card, place 2 units in your homeland.

label: Assassins
rules: Any action: Select a region with exactly 1 enemy unit (up to 2 units if you have 3 conspiracy cards). If you have 3 crime cards, you may pay 2 coins to convert them. Otherwise kill them.

label: Alchemists
rules:
Melee - gain +1 melee die if you control 3 regions adjacent to the Battlefield
Battle: move up to 1 unit per tactic from the Battlefield to an adjacent region.

label: Siege Engines
rules:
Battle: Ranged - sacrifice a unit on the Battlefield. Kill 2 enemy units there.
Any action: sell up to 1 resource per magic, each for 4 coins (+2 per other wealth)

label: Soul Shepherds
rules:
When you activate a retinue card, gain 1 charge, store up to 6.
Start of Combat phase: for every two charges you spend, select a different region adjacent to your units. For each region, roll 3 dice, +2 per other siege. On each 4+, kill 1 enemy unit there

label: Illusionists
rules:
1. When you sacrifice units, place them on this card.
2. When 2 or more your units die in Battle sacrifice one of them, unless there are 3 units on this card already.
Battle: count units on this card as if they were on the Battlefield

label: Quartermasters
rules:
When you activate a crime, steal 2 coins from an opponent.
Battle: Ranged and Melee - opponent rolls 2 less dice (+1 per other magic), subtracting from ranged first, then any remainder from melee.

label: Trolls
rules:
1 When you activate a retinue, gain 1 food and add 1 charge to another card
2. When you Move, you may spend up to 1 food per warrior to place that many units among the destination regions.

label: Archers
rules:
When you Recruit, you may buy up to two additional units per mercenary for 1 coin each. 
Battle: roll +2 melee dice, (+1 per other wilderness)

label: Vampires
rules: Battle: Ranged - roll 2 dice per tactic, up to 5. On each 3+, assign 1 hit

label: Pillagers
rules:
1. In each battle where you deal at least 2 hits, ignore 1 hit assigned to you.
 Battle: Melee - you may sacrifice up to 1 unit (+1 if you have 3 cultist) to roll +3 melee dice for each.

label: Secret tunnels
rules:
When you would steal one or more coins but the target doesn't have enough, kill one of their units in a region with your unit.
Battle: Melee - pay up to 1 coin per mercenary to gain +2 melee dice for each. Aftermath - steal 1 coin per unit you killed from the owners

label: Local Levys
rules:
When you activate a conspiracy, gain 1 resource. When you activate an expansion, gain 2 coins.
Battle: Start of Battle - move any number of units from homeland or from an adjacent region to the Battlefield ignoring control. Gain that many extra melee dice, up to expansion

label: Trade routes
rules:
1. When you activate a tactic card, move 1 step.
2. When you activate a commoner card, place 1 unit in your homeland.

label: Heralds of apocalypse
rules:
You may buy resources for 2 coins each.
Any action: gain 3 coins (+1 per other wealth) per expansion

label: Grand Fair
rules:
When your last unit in a region dies, place 1 unit to your homeland (+1 if you have 3 cultists)
If you have 3 conspiracy, place them in any village with your unit (other than the Battlefield) instead.

label: Knights
rules: Cleanup: You may convert 1 enemy unit per crime for 5 coins each

label: Stone giants
rules: You have +1 to all combat rolls.

label: Vigilante mob
rules:
"When you Recruit, you pay exactly 1 stone to buy 1 extra unit per wilderness. Place them in a mountain region you control.
Any action: destroy all enemy outposts in regions you control. Gain 2 wood for each.

label: Royal mages
rules: Any action: gain 1 unit per conspiracy. Place them in any village (you don't have to control it)

label: Undead Horde
rules: Battle: Ranged - roll 3 dice (+1 per other magic). Each 3+ is a success. Select that many connected regions containing the Battlefield. Kill one unit in each.

label: Skirmishers
rules:
When you Recruit, gain +1 unit per shadow tag. 
Battle: you may discard 1 commoner card from frontline or reserve and place 2 units on the Battlefield

label: Dragon Riders
rules:
Battle: before combat roll, roll 6 dice, +3 per other siege. For each 3+ roll, kill 1 enemy unit. 
Move: ignore control. One of the steps can be up to 2 regions distance, skipping the middle region

label: Wraiths
rules:
Cleanup: Select three connected regions, all with your units or adjacent to them. Roll 3 dice, +1 per other shadow. Each 3+ is a hit in the first region. Apply any leftover hits to the second region, then to the third
Final scoring: gain 1 VP for every three regions with no units in them

label: Flying Castles
rules:
Battle: Start of Battle - you may move your outposts to any other regions ignoring distance and control. Roll +2 melee dice per region on or adjacent to the Battlefield.
Final scoring: gain 2VP if you have 5 nobility

label: Werewolves
rules:
When you kill a unit, gain 1 food (+1 if you have 5 warriors).
Aftermath - if you killed at least one unit, you may Battle there again immediately. Roll +1 die per wilderness in repeat Battles
Battle: roll +1 melee die per food you have
Final Scoring: gain 1 VP per 12 food

label: Demons
rules:
Sacrifice 7 units to buy this, minus the number of cultists. 
Any action: move one step from your homeland to any region
Battle: roll 3 extra dice, (+1 per other cultist)

label: Valkyries
rules:
Place your units killed by opponents on this card. 
Battle: place 2 units per nobility on the Battlefield. Roll 1 extra combat die per nobility
Final Scoring: gain 1VP for every host on this card. A host is 12 units minus nobility

label: Infiltrators
rules:
Lock: choose two different tags. This card counts as two cards of each of those tags.
Final scoring: select two different tags, this card counts as 1 card of each tag. No other card on your frontline can share more than 1 tag with this card
